- **AG-UI hardening** (`src/api/main.py`, `src/config/settings.py`):
  - Bind a single bounded `ThreadPoolExecutor` (configurable `thread_pool_max_workers`, default 16) via a FastAPI lifespan, activated globally with `Agent.using_thread_executor` and shut down with `wait=True` on shutdown
